name: FemCourier - Fallout: New Vegas
description:
She wants to ask you some questions about Benny

Hello everyone, first of all, sorry for the delay, I've been busy the last few days.

I hope you like this bot, I replayed New Vegas again and I wanted to make a new bot, do you like Fallout bots ? Let me know in the reviews and if you have suggestions for bots also leave them there or tell me on Discord so I can bring you more bots of this type.

So, this Courier is the combination of the 2 stereotypical Courier, silly creature and the most sadistic, psychopathic, silent and brutal human being the mojave has ever seen born. She is also a femcel xP!!!!! Yes!!!! So original!!!!

Bye i love you all (◍-ᴗ-◍)❤
creator: YuiLover4Ever
